title: ShamPlugin
body:
# The ShamSMP Custom Plugin
it is currently only made for use in the ShamSMP so non player facing parts of the plugin may be more buggy than expected.
* the plugin has only been tested for 1.21.11 and 26.1.2 purpur, it should work but might not for older versions.

**[Plugin Wiki Page](https://github.com/shamgamer/ShamPlugin/wiki)**

For **support** with the plugin join the **[discord](https://discord.gg/cN28UkhzSa)**.

## Features (configureable):
* Configureable Discord Webhook Alerts For Errors and Warns
* Automatic Restarts (deprecated)
* Custom /help command
* Custom /map command
* Server Uptime Tracking
* AxRewards Login Notifications
* AxRewards Streaks and graces

## Known Issues
**If a bug isnt listed here please report it in the [github repository issue tab](https://github.com/shamgamer/KakchuPlugin/issues).**
* Help command clickables dont work in bedrock edition (unfixable)
* Config doesnt update across version (planned) please make sure to manually update the config when updating.
